name: Pepsi-Cola Cake with Broiled Peanut Butter Frostin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 9 x 13 x 2-inch pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour and sugar. In another bowl, melt the butter, then stir in cocoa powder and Pepsi until well blended.
3. Pour the wet mixture over the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Add buttermilk, beaten eggs, baking soda, and vanilla extract; mix until smooth.
5. Stir in marshmallows. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 40 minutes.
6. Remove cake from oven and let cool slightly.
7. For frosting: In a bowl, cream together butter, sugar, and peanut butter. Add milk and stir well. Fold in chopped peanuts.
8. Spread frosting over the warm cake. Place under the broiler about 4-inches from heat source for a few seconds until the topping bubbles slightly.
9. Turn off broiler and allow to cool at least 30 minutes before serving.
